title: How to Play ZXBrick
seoTitle: How to Play ZXBrick | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn the basics of ZXBrick, including the game goal, level progression, power-ups, achievements, and leaderboards.
summary: ZXBrick is a retro-inspired brick-breaking arcade game focused on fast play sessions, level progression, high scores, power-ups, achievements, and leaderboards.
sourceNotes: Generated from pages/apps/zxbrick.json, pages/data/apps.json, pages/zx-series.json, and existing ZXBrick news content.
Specific controls, scoring rules, power-up effects, achievement IDs, leaderboard IDs, and wallet behavior are To Verify from app source or platform metadata.

sections.heading: Goal
paragraphs: ZXBrick is a classic brick-breaking arcade game from the [ZX Series](/zx-series). The broad goal is to play through brick-breaking levels, chase high scores, collect useful rewards, and build progress through supported achievements and leaderboards.
bullets: Use power-ups as part of the arcade experience.
Chase high scores and Game Center leaderboard progress.

sections.heading: Progression
paragraphs: ZXBrick includes 100 handcrafted levels, unlockable themes, achievements, high score tracking, and Game Center leaderboard support. It also supports [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series), which are earned through gameplay and used for cosmetic unlocks across supported BarkinMad Studios games.

sections.heading: More Help
paragraphs: For more detail, see the [ZXBrick power-ups guide](/apps/zxbrick/powerups) and [ZXBrick levels guide](/apps/zxbrick/levels).

faq.question: Is ZXBrick part of the ZX Series?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXBrick is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), alongside games such as [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), and [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong).

faq.question: How many levels does ZXBrick include?
